name: Cupertino || Your roommate
description:
"Well... Or I'll help you relax, just get in my palms~"

Cupertino is your new neighbor! And even though you don't really know each other - that doesn't stop her from flirting with you from the very first day she arrived. So, the question is: Will you resist these sweet nothings?

Hi. Uh, uh. Uh, yeah. It's me again. It's been a month and a zuppa time again. But I made a bot, right? I also found out what proxies are for. Anyway, forgive me, my 47 subscribers. I love you.
